violations.text: Various breakfast items are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Per PIC, establishment is waiting for reprint of menus. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 1-door low boy by the griddle, 2-door reach-in #2 in the back food preparation area, and 1-door reach-in #2 in back area by the walk-in cooler. Refrigerator gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2025

The ceiling in the back food preparation area was observed cracked or missing portions of ceiling covering and is in poor repair. The physical facilities shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Per PIC, establishment is waiting for supplier order to arrive. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Various breakfast items are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Per PIC, establishment is waiting for reprint of menus. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025

Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Smoked salmon was observed thawed in the 1-door reach-in by the dish area with intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood items that are packaged within ROP packaging shall be completely removed from the original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Food item was observed at 37 degrees Fahrenheit and was removed from its packaging during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Bread loaves packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 1-door low boy by the griddle, 2-door reach-in #2 in the back food preparation area, and 1-door reach-in #2 in back area by the walk-in cooler. Refrigerator gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machines have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

A hose is connected to the faucet at the service sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The ceiling in the back food preparation area was observed cracked or missing portions of ceiling covering and is in poor repair. The physical facilities shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the back food preparation area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024

Working containers (Spray Bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Chemical solutions taken from bulk supply shall be labeled. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, Corn beef hash was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Food was still within the first 2 hours of the cooling process and was moved onto a sheet pan and then into the walk-in cooler to finish the cooling process. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

Bread loaves packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machines have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

A hose is connected to the faucet at the service sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet rooms that open to food preparation areas shall be self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
The floor grout by the 3-bay sink in the kitchen is low and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the back food preparation area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024
